Notice Of Motion For Writ Of Mandamus
Off Calendar Feb-27-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Alexander Hansen, Esq. 415-431-5310 of Jones Clifford for Petitioner ANNETTE HOBRUCKER-PFEIFER.
Nancy Tavernit, Deputy City Attorney 415-554-3800 of the Office of the City Attorney for Respondent.

RULING - A R G U E D. Hearing is held. Petitioner argues misapplication of legal standard. Respondent argues.(as fully reported in the reporter's notes) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PETITIONER ANNETTE HOBRUCKER-PFEIFER's Motion For Writ Of Mandamus is Taken under submission.*(as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. (D302/RBU)

*After the hearing, the Court issues a Statement of Decision Denying Petition for Writ of Administrative Mandamus. (see scanned statement of Decision for details)
